untranslatable_reason: Gravestone Doji pattern detection requires candlestick pattern recognition (upper_wick, lower_wick, body ratio analysis) not fully expressible with basic comparisons. Entry condition 'Price trending downward into the gravestone doji candle' requires multi-bar trend analysis and doji formation metrics (open == close with long upper wick, minimal lower wick). Exit conditions marked AUTHOR_SILENT with no explicit reversal rule provided. Numeric parameters in source text are ambiguous reference data, not actionable thresholds.
translation_notes: Signal describes a candlestick reversal pattern requiring visual/structural pattern recognition beyond basic indicator thresholds. Placeholder conditions use price direction reversal as proxy for upward breakout, but true gravestone doji identification requires: (1) long upper wick relative to body, (2) minimal/no lower wick, (3) open ≈ close, (4) prior downtrend confirmation. Data columns (L2,132 etc.) appear to be frequency statistics, not operational parameters. Consider implementing custom pattern detector or using dedicated candlestick library for accurate signal.
